title: Sugar Mintu Kari Lyrics BruceLee
stanzas:
Bruce Lee Sugar Mintu Kari Song Lyrics
Singer:GV Prakash Kumar, Manasi MM,
Lyrics:Mani kandan

hey en sugar mint-u kaari
un jigarthanda naan di
color legging pant-u kaari

pattu kunju nee
kutti nenju nee
chella kutti nee
en kanmani

kooda vandhu nee
kutti mohini
kudaadha thappu
pannaendi..

lady KD neeyadi
soodu yethum theeyadi
french made strawberry di
ne dooppu potta peyadi

baby en heart-u beatu nee
neethan en target di
sentiment scene book-u di
naan un modern
bruce lee di

ye chutti pennae
little sun-ae
en girl friend nee
ketta pennae

pennae pennae
rowdy penne
en feeling-a share
seyyum ginger ginne

silluthae megamey
kolluthe megamae

hey chinna chinna
poikkaaranae
grace time-il
kiss vaenumey..

seatbelt-a pol hug podhumey
en beglinton dog ivaney

lady KD neeyadi
soodu yethum theeyadi
french made strawberry di
ne dooppu potta paeyadi

baby en heart-u beatu nee
neethan en target di
sentiment scene book-u di
naan un modern
bruce lee di

ye sokkupadi kannalanaan
makku payyan aanenadi
bujji kutti naan singa kutti
enna aakkitta naayikutti

uchchimael muththamae
vendumey niththamae

suthi suthi enna suthi
vandhaaye uchchu kotti

konji konji kannaamoochi
thalli po kanna katti

lady KD neeyadi
soodu yethum theeyadi
french made strawberry di
ne dooppu potta paeyadi

baby en heart-u beatu nee
neethan en target di
sentiment scene book-u di
naan un modern
bruce lee di

hey en sugar mint-u kaari
un jigarthanda naan di
color legging pant-u kaari

pattu kunju nee
kutti nenju nee
chella kutti nee
en kanmani

kooda vandhu nee
kutti mohini
kudaadha thappu
pannaendi..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Sugar Mintu Kari is a playful and romantic song that expresses affection through sweet metaphors and lively imagery.

How does this song fit into the movie plot?

This song adds a fun and energetic vibe to Bruce Lee, showcasing the light-hearted moments between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of GV Prakash Kumar and Manasi MM.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Sugar Mintu Kari was composed by GV Prakash Kumar himself.

When was this song released?

Sugar Mintu Kari was released on October 22, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sugar Mintu Kari, the lively beats and playful lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration, perfectly reflecting the youthful exuberance of the characters in Bruce Lee. The song captures the essence of flirtation and affection, making it a delightful addition to any festive occasion. With its catchy tune and energetic vibe, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This duet showcases the chemistry between the singers, enhancing the overall charm of the track.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sugar Mintu Kari from Bruce Lee is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, perfectly encapsulated by the dynamic vocals of GV Prakash Kumar and Manasi MM. This upbeat track, composed by GV Prakash Kumar himself, is sure to get you on your feet with its infectious energy. Dive into the catchy rhythms and playful lyrics that make this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, my sweet sugar, you are like a colorful legging pant.
You are a little bird, a small heart, my dear little one, my darling.
Come here, little beauty, don't make a mistake by coming here.
Lady, you are the one who is sweet, nothing is bad, you are like a French-made strawberry, you are a lovely girl.
Baby, my heart beats for you, you are my target, in this sentimental scene, I am your modern Bruce Lee.
Hey, little girl, you are like a little sun, my girlfriend, you are a lovely girl.
Girl, girl, rowdy girl, sharing my feelings like ginger ale.
The little one is shining brightly, the big one is shining too.
Hey, little girl, you need a kiss during grace time.
Like a seatbelt, a hug is enough, my little dog is here.
Lady, you are the one who is sweet, nothing is bad, you are like a French-made strawberry, you are a lovely girl.
Baby, my heart beats for you, you are my target, in this sentimental scene, I am your modern Bruce Lee.
Hey, what a situation, I have become a silly boy, I am a little lion, what have you turned me into, little dog?
I need a crown on my head, always.
Turning around, what has come around, it has hit me hard.
A little bit, close your eyes, and pull away, close your eyes tightly.
Lady, you are the one who is sweet, nothing is bad, you are like a French-made strawberry, you are a lovely girl.
Baby, my heart beats for you, you are my target, in this sentimental scene, I am your modern Bruce Lee.
Hey, my sweet sugar, you are like a colorful legging pant.
You are a little bird, a small heart, my dear little one, my darling.
Come here, little beauty, don't make a mistake by coming here.
